series_metadata.series_description: Series covers OOD postings to Social Media sites including, but not limited to Facebook, Twitter, Youtube, etc. This information includes, but is not limited to press releases, videos, events and general information about OOD. This series also covers non-OOD generated postings removed by OOD pursuant to OOD’s Policy.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: OOD postings - Retain until updated or no longer needed. Non-OOD postings - Retain for current month., Electronic: Erase
